quests.title: Step 1 — Meet Guide Byte
quests.description: Start at the town guide. He will point you to the first resume fragment.

quests.title: Step 2 — Recover the Core Profile
quests.description: Collect the Profile Shard near the water edge to unlock the first resume entry.
steps: Follow the objective toward the water edge

quests.title: Step 3 — Prove Field Credibility
quests.description: Meet the Field Mentor to unlock the practical field-work section.

quests.title: Step 4 — Stabilize the Workshop Route
quests.description: Collect the Builder Shard, then deliver it to the Workshop Terminal to restore the builder/product systems section.
steps: Bring it to the Workshop Terminal

quests.title: Step 5 — Assemble the Operating System
quests.description: Speak to the Archive Keeper and restore the operations/leadership layer of the resume.
